desc.en: Adapter for EV charging stations with multi-vehicle support

0.1.0-alpha.10.en: CPT-based alpha with multi-vehicle config and widget JSON.

0.1.0-alpha.11.en: Cleaned package, removed backup files, improved branding and kept CPT-based multi-vehicle logic.

0.1.0-alpha.12.en: Added stable widget state defaults and CPT-style VIS template.

0.1.0-alpha.13.en: Removed legacy single vehicle configuration fields; vehicles table only.

0.1.0-alpha.14.en: Per-vehicle connector types, cleaned object structure and nearest station filtering by connector type.

0.1.0-alpha.15.en: Vehicle connector types changed from CSV text to multi-select dropdown in admin UI.

0.1.0-alpha.16.en: Connector configuration simplified: supportsType2 / supportsCCS flags per vehicle.

0.1.0-alpha.17.en: Removed legacy car and nearestType2 object creation; cleaned object structure.

0.1.0-alpha.18.en: Vehicle state fields in admin UI now use objectId selectors.
